title: Proving Ground
description: Guildmaster Vorn of the Dalhurst Adventurer's Guild is willing to consider you for membership, but first you must prove yourself. Clear out a pack of wolves that has been terrorizing travelers on the road to Thornfield.

objectives.description: Slay 8 wolves menacing the road to Thornfield
Return to Guildmaster Vorn with proof of your deed

notes: Rank: Initiate. Basic combat test. Wolves spawn on roads between Dalhurst and Thornfield.
